summary: Recording suffers from a right‑hand channel problem and is of poor quality; no musical details are available.
review: The sole reviewer notes a noticeable issue with the RHT (right) channel, which makes the audio sound unbalanced and detracts from listenability. No comments on the performance itself were provided, leaving the show quality indeterminate.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief review with a zero‑star rating highlighting a serious recording flaw; no positive information about the performance to offset the poor audio.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Right‑hand channel (RHT) has problems, causing imbalance/muted sound on that side of the mix.
